name: competitive-intelligence-brief-generator
description: Single-step flow pipeline that executes the Competitive Intelligence Brief Generator skill to produce a comprehensive competitive brief.

steps.description: Execute all 6 phases of competitive intelligence analysis and produce a formatted brief with recommendations.

company_name.description: Name of the target company to analyze

outputs.strengths: array of strength objects with evidence and impact
outputs.weaknesses: array of weakness objects with evidence and severity
outputs.recent_moves: array of strategic move objects with implications
outputs.strategic_recommendations: array of prioritized recommendations with confidence scores
outputs.key_threats: array of threat objects with likelihood and monitoring signals
outputs.key_opportunities: array of opportunity objects with addressability
outputs.confidence_notes: string explaining data quality and caveats
outputs.data_quality_summary: object with source age metrics and completeness percentage

entry_inputs.name: company_name
entry_inputs.description: Name of the target company to analyze

entry_inputs.name: industry_focus
entry_inputs.description: Primary industry or sector (e.g., SaaS, Healthcare Tech)

entry_inputs.name: time_window_months
entry_inputs.description: How many months back to scan for recent moves (default: 12)

entry_inputs.name: competitive_set_size
entry_inputs.description: Number of direct competitors to reference (default: 5)

entry_inputs.name: analysis_depth
entry_inputs.description: Analysis depth: quick, standard, or deep (default: standard)

entry_inputs.name: data_freshness_threshold_months
entry_inputs.description: Maximum age of data sources before flagging as stale (default: 6)
